title: leucorchis straminea
intro: Leucorchis straminea, also known as the Golden Ground Orchid, is a species of orchid native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Leucorchis straminea is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
